headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -41.4)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 37% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 124 quotes including 94 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• The frustration score of 32.8 sits in the middle of its 91-day range, showing typical levels of discontent for this period.

• Fears dropped significantly from yesterday (-22.9 vs -11.0) while frustrations cooled from yesterday's much higher peak.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
